# Fixture: benign-api-docs-02.txt | Pattern: none | Expected: CLEAN
type Query {
  evaluate(text: String!): EvaluationResult!
  constraints: [Constraint!]!
  health: HealthStatus!
}

type EvaluationResult {
  verdict: Verdict!
  score: Float!
  violations: [Violation!]
}

enum Verdict {
  PASS
  BLOCK
}
